ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the component (e.g., PCF8575DBQR) */,
  "package_type" TEXT /* Type of package (e.g., SSOP, TVSOP) */,
  "package_drawing" TEXT /* Drawing of the package (e.g., DBQ, DGV) */,
  "pins" INTEGER /* Number of pins */,
  "spq" INTEGER /* Standard pack quantity */,
  "length_mm" REAL /* Length of the component in mm */,
  "width_mm" REAL /* Width of the component in mm */,
  "height_mm" REAL /* Height of the component in mm */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer of the component */,
  "manufacturer_part_number" TEXT /* Part number assigned by the manufacturer */,
  "operating_temperature_range" TEXT /* Range of temperatures in which the component can operate */,
  "storage_temperature_range" TEXT /* Range of temperatures in which the component can be stored */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for ordering the component */,
  "data_sheet_url" TEXT /* URL to the component's data sheet */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the component is currently active in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_package_type FOREIGN KEY ("package_type") REFERENCES packages ("package_type")
)

CREATE TABLE "packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package */,
  "package_type" TEXT /* Type of package (e.g., SSOP, TVSOP) */,
  "package_drawing" TEXT /* Drawing of the package (e.g., DBQ, DGV) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the package */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used in the package (e.g., ceramic, plastic) */,
  "thermal_resistance" TEXT /* Thermal resistance of the package */,
  "electrical_characteristics" TEXT /* Electrical characteristics of the package (e.g., capacitance, inductance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the supplier */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the supplier's website */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms agreed with the supplier (e.g., net 30, net 60) */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Supplier rating based on performance (e.g., 1-5 scale) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component in stock */,
  "warehouse_location" TEXT /* Location of the component in the warehouse */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last updated */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Quantity at which a reorder should be initiated */,
  "lead_time_days" INTEGER /* Number of days it takes to receive a new stock from the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_location FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_location") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the warehouse */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the warehouse */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the warehouse */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "operating_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_lines" (
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product line */,
  "product_line_name" TEXT /* Name of the product line */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product line */,
  "introduction_date" TEXT /* Date when the product line was introduced */,
  "lead_product_manager" TEXT /* Name of the lead product manager for the product line */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the product line (e.g., active, discontinued) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product line */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component used in the product line */,
  "usage_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the component started being used in the product line */,
  "usage_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the component stopped being used in the product line (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_usage_product_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_line_id") REFERENCES product_lines ("product_line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_usage_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, procurement specialist, warehouse manager) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
